capabilities.comment: FX Fluo Flicker - Green Magenta Point
FX Fluo Flicker - Crossfade to Color

gwSpecs.description: EclFresnel CT+MIP  is an IP65 350W LED Fresnel, engineered with a new 6 colours light source and  a 200mm / 8'' front lens. Being IP65 rated, the unit is both water and dust resistant ensuring safe application in any set or extreme locations, keeping lightweight and not scaling up in sizes.

revision.text: Rev 054 - Fan mode updated as FW 1_1_10_0 - RGB mode link to ColorSpace Native
